zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bates or Batt於大約1465年出生在英國英格蘭肯特萊德時，他的父親Thomas Bate26歲，母親Margaret Agnes Parre26歲。他於1494年與Sara Roberts在英國英格蘭結婚。他去世於1522年9月17日在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特萊德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Bates or Batt于大约1465年出生在英国英格兰肯特萊德时，他的父亲Thomas Bate26岁，母亲Margaret Agnes Parre26岁。他于1494年与Sara Roberts在英国英格兰结婚。他去世于1522年9月17日在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特萊德。

nameMeanings.name: Batt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Bat(te), probably a pet form of Middle English Bartelmew (see Bartholomew ) or perhaps the rarer Bartram (see Bertram ).

English: probably in many cases a variant of Back 2 ‘bat’ (the winged animal), applied as a nickname. The alteration of Middle English bakke to bat is not on record before 1580, but the frequency with which le Bat occurs in medieval documents suggests that this is a likely source of the name. Alternatively, it may be from Middle English bat(te) (Old English batt) ‘cudgel, club, bat’, perhaps for someone of stout appearance or for one who wielded a bat.

English: topographic name, of uncertain meaning. That it is a topographic name seems clear from examples such as Walter atte Batte (Somerset 1327), but the meaning of the term is in doubt although it is found in medieval field names.

variants.name: Bat
meanings: German: variant of   Batt  . This surname is very rare in Germany.

variants.name: Batty
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire): from the Middle English personal name Batty, a pet form of Batt .

variants.name: Bartholomew
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Bertilmew, Bertelmy, a borrowing of the Old French form of the Biblical personal name Bartholomew (from Latin Bartholomaeus; Hebrew ‘son of Talmai’, said to mean ‘having many furrows’, i.e. rich in land). This was an extremely popular personal name in Christian Europe, with many vernacular derivatives. It derived its popularity from the apostle Saint Bartholomew (Matthew 10:3), who was, among other things, the patron saint of tanners, vintners, and butlers.
As an Irish name, it has been used as an Anglicized form of Mac Pharthaláin (see McFarlane ).

variants.name: Batts
meanings: English (Oxfordshire): variant of Batt with possessive, plural, or excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Bates
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Bate with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also common in Ireland.
Americanized form of German   Betz  . See also   Betts  .

variants.name: Bate
meanings: Short form of Katherine (or any of its variant spellings), reflecting the French pronunciation with -t- for -th-, which was also usual in medieval England. This short form has been continuously popular since the Middle Ages, and is now frequently used as an independent given name. It was used by Shakespeare for two important characters: the daughter of the King of France who is wooed and won by King Henry V , and the ‘shrew’ in The Taming of the Shrew.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

en.lifeSummary: When John Bates or Batt was born about 1465, in Lydd, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Bate, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Agnes Parre, was 26. He married Sara Roberts in 1494, in England, United Kingdom. He died on 17 September 1522, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Lydd, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Bates or Batt est né environ 1465, à Lydd, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Bate, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Agnes Parre, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Sara Roberts en 1494, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 17 septembre 1522, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Lydd, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Bates or Batt um 1465 in Lydd, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Bate 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Agnes Parre 26. Er hat 1494 in England, United Kingdom Sara Roberts geheiratet. Er starb am 17. September 1522 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lydd, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Bates or Batt è nato il circa 1465 nel Lydd, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Bate, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Agnes Parre, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Sara Roberts nel 1494, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 17 settembre 1522, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Lydd, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bates or Battが約1465年にイギリスイギリスケントリッドで生まれた時，父Thomas Bateは26歳，母Margaret Agnes Parreは26歳であった。1494年にイギリスイギリスでSara Robertsと結婚した。彼は1522年9月17日に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントリッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bates or Batt(이)가 대략 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 리드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Bate(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Agnes Parre(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1494년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sara Roberts(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1522년 9월 17일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 리드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Bates or Batt nasceu aproximadamente 1465, em Lydd, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Bate, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Agnes Parre, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Sara Roberts em 1494, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 17 de setembro de 1522, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Lydd, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bates or Batt родился около 1465 г. в местности лидд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Bate было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Agnes Parre, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Sara Roberts в 1494 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 17 сентября 1522 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности лидд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Bates or Batt nació aproximadamente 1465, en Lydd, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Bate, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Agnes Parre, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sara Roberts en 1494, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 17 de septiembre de 1522, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Lydd, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
